meaning: n.突然发作,适合,痉挛,一阵adj.合适的,恰当的,健康的,,准备好的vt.适合,安装,使合身,使适应,使合格vi.适合,符合
examples: Another fit of coughing seized him.
He has done so by completely overhauling his company to fit these straitened times.
England were down to three frontline bowlers and Gayle showed scant respect for the two fit pacemen.
